# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-without-sidecar
  labels:
    app: no-sidecar
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: no-sidecar
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
      labels:
        app: no-sidecar
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-service-container
        image: my-service-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: another-service-no-sidecar
  labels:
    app: another-no-sidecar
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: another-no-sidecar
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
      labels:
        app: another-no-sidecar
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: another-service-container
        image: another-service-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9090

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service
  labels:
    app: low-latency
spec:
  replicas: 5
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
      labels:
        app: low-latency
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: low-latency-container
        image: low-latency-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 6060
